title: Portable Ashtray, Stainless Steel Square Pocket Mini Ashtray for Travel with Lid, Small and Odour-Proof, perfect for Outdoor Camping, Hiking, Travel, Garden, Bar, Car (White)
features: Stainless steel material: The mini ashtray is made of high quality stainless steel, durable, heat-resistant and corrosion-resistant, easy to clean, and can be used for a long time.
Easy to use: With a lid design, the ashtray can be opened only by pressing a button. You can store cigarette butts in an airtight ashtray that is safe to use and easy to open.

Environmentally friendly: Good sealing with lid, cigarette ash will not leak out and no odor leaching. Whether it's a car, restaurant, park or picnic, we can still enjoy cigarettes without polluting the environment.

Lightweight and Portable: The portable ashtray measures 6*4*2 cm. Mini ashtray is light in weight and small in size, can be put in your pocket, you can carry it with you without taking up too much space.

Best gift: Ideal for travel, camping, hiking, fishing and daily use. This pocket ashtray is a great gift for smokers. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will do our best to meet your requirements.
description: Metal material, extremely durable, easy to carry and store. Its design is with cover, which can well ash and cigarette butts without flying dust. Just open the ashtray and pour out the ash. Rinse with water directly and wipe with a dry cloth. Travel ashtray pocket do not take up much space in your pocket, small ashtray is convenient. Fashionable design and very convenient, a wonderful gift for your friends. Ideal for travel, camping, hiking, fishing and daily use.
